probe.probe_blocked_reason: ctx_execute is deny-listed in normal profile; executing it would violate project policy. Probe requires isolated local profile not committed to repo.

ctx_execute_evidence.upstream_756_report: ctx_execute reports main repo root and master branch instead of worktree

ctx_execute is deny-listed; nested repo cwd comparison blocked by policy

informational_only.claude_project_dir_note: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is informational only per Claude Code docs; it is the stable project root passed to stdio MCP servers, not the session cwd. Must not be used for cwd correctness judgment.

local_probe_result.reason: ctx_execute deny-listed in normal profile; no isolated probe profile was committed

ctx_execute.reason: upstream #756 confirms wrong-tree execution; deny-listed in project settings

ctx_execute_file.reason: Repo-relative file resolution risk; sibling tool not yet evaluated
